message: fix(ci): use npm install instead of npm ci (no lockfile in repo)

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: 22
-      - run: npm ci
+      - run: npm install
       - run: npm run typecheck
 
   test:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: 22
-      - run: npm ci
+      - run: npm install
       - run: npm run test:workers
 
   benchmark:
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: 22
-      - run: npm ci
+      - run: npm install
       - name: Run tests with timing
         run: npm run test:workers -- --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
       - name: Summary
